message: Propose we both submit 60 this round and every round. Steady trade at 60 maximizes our payoffs over 20 rounds.
I cannot trade at 60. Let's find a lower price that works for both of us.
Counteroffer: both submit 42 this round and every round. Steady trades at 42 over 20 rounds. Last round's 35 bid/50 ask averaged ~42 anyway. Deal?
I can't profit at 42. Propose we both submit 30 this round for mutual gain. Let's trade lower.
30 worked well. Propose both submit 35 every round: you bid 35 before, profitable for both. Steady 35 maximizes payoffs over 20 rounds. Deal?
30 benefits both. Let's continue at 30 for mutual gain. I propose we both submit 30 this round.
Let's continue at 30. It benefits both of us and has worked well for two rounds. Steady trades at 30 maximize our payoffs.
30 too thin long-term. You bid 35 before. Both submit 35 every round: steady trades at 35 maximize payoffs over 17 rounds. Deal?
One missed trade cost us both. Both submit 32 every round: steady profit at 32 over 16 rounds beats zeros. Deal?
I propose 30 again. It has worked and gives higher payoffs for both. Let's both submit 30 this round and every round.

30 worked twice giving us both good gains. Let's lock in 30 every round for steady high payoffs. I'll bid 30 this round.
31 averaged well last trade. Both submit 31 every round: steady +11 me, profitable you over 14 rounds. Beats missed trades. Deal?
30 gives both higher payoffs. Let's stick to 30 for steady trades. I'll bid 30 this round.
